description: Ground-truth cases for compliance benchmark. Each case defines one substitution scenario: which product, which raw material to replace, and what results we expect the compliance engine to return.

cases.description: One sentence explaining what substitution this tests and why it should work or fail.

_field_reference.case_id: Unique string identifier for this test case. Use format: '<material>-<context>-<number>', e.g. 'soy-lecithin-protein-bar-001'
_field_reference.description: Human-readable explanation of the scenario. What are we substituting, in what product, and why is it interesting.
_field_reference.product_id: Integer DB id of the finished-good product (type='finished-good' in products table).
_field_reference.raw_material_id: Integer DB id of the raw material we want to replace (type='raw-material' in products table).
_field_reference.expected_ids: List of integer raw-material IDs that SHOULD appear in the top-K results. Precision/Recall/F1 computed against this set.
_field_reference.ideal_ranking: Ordered list of expected_ids best-to-worst. Used for NDCG and MRR. Set to [] if order does not matter.
_field_reference.difficulty: One of: 'easy' (obvious substitutes, high similarity), 'medium' (reasonable fit with tradeoffs), 'hard' (non-obvious, edge case).
